content.description: File content as UTF-8 text, or 'b64:<base64>' when the file is not valid UTF-8.

size_bytes.description: Size of the file in bytes (matches the on-disk size, not the encoded size). Does not change when a line slice is requested.

is_binary.description: True when the file content was not valid UTF-8 and was base64-encoded in 'content'.

returned_bytes.description: Size of the slice actually returned in 'content', in bytes. For text files without line arguments this equals size_bytes; for text files with a line slice it is the byte size of the sliced content. Present for UTF-8 text files only.

total_lines.description: Total line count of the file. Present for UTF-8 text files only. When no line arguments are supplied this equals returned_lines.

returned_lines.description: Line count of the slice actually returned in 'content'. Present for UTF-8 text files only. When no line arguments are supplied this equals total_lines.
